FURINA_POWER_SALON_SOLITAIRE_POWER.descr: Once per turn: Right-click this minion to grant/remove Guardian. (Guardian can only exist on one minion at a time)
FURINA_POWER_SALON_SOLITAIRE_POWER.smart: Once per turn: Right-click this minion to grant/remove Guardian. (Guardian can only exist on one minion at a time)
HYDRO_BARRAGE.title: Hydro Barrage
HYDRO_BARRAGE.description: Click to deal {Damage} damage to an enemy.
HYDRO_BARRAGE.smartDescription: Click to deal {Damage} damage to an enemy.
CRAB_SHIELD.title: Crab Shield
CRAB_SHIELD.description: Click to give {Block} block to an ally.
CRAB_SHIELD.smartDescription: Click to give {Block} block to an ally.
PURE_WATER_NOTE.title: Pure Water Note
PURE_WATER_NOTE.description: Click to draw {Draw} card. Refreshes every 2 turns.
PURE_WATER_NOTE.smartDescription: Click to draw {Draw} card. Refreshes every 2 turns.

JOYFUL_SINGING.description: Gain {Energy} [E] when this minion leaves combat.

FURINA_POWER_AGILITY_POWER.title: Agility
FURINA_POWER_AGILITY_POWER.description: The next time you play a Skill that gains Block, it gains additional Block equal to this amount, then lose that much Agility.
FURINA_POWER_AGILITY_POWER.smartDescript: The next time you play a Skill that gains Block, it gains additional Block equal to this amount, then lose that much Agility.
FURINA_POWER_SLOW_MOTION_POWER.title: Slow Motion
FURINA_POWER_CHORUS_POWER.title: Chorus
FURINA_POWER_CHORUS_POWER.description: The next OusiaPneuma card you play has both effects.
FURINA_POWER_CHORUS_POWER.smartDescripti: The next OusiaPneuma card you play has both effects.
FURINA_POWER_MASQUERADE_POWER.title: Masquerade of the Guilty
FURINA_POWER_MASQUERADE_POWER.descriptio:
At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards.
If you draw fewer than 10 cards in a turn, die.
{Amount} turns remaining.
FURINA_POWER_MASQUERADE_POWER.smartDescr:
At the start of your turn, draw 2 additional cards.
If you draw fewer than 10 cards in a turn, die.
Cards drawn this turn: {CardsDrawn}/10
{Amount} turns remaining.
FURINA_POWER_CARNIVAL_FORM_POWER.title: Carnival Form
FURINA_POWER_CARNIVAL_FORM_POWER.descrip: Whenever you draw a card on your turn, gain {Amount} Strength and {Amount} Dexterity this turn.
FURINA_POWER_CARNIVAL_FORM_POWER.smartDe: Whenever you draw a card on your turn, gain {Amount} Strength and {Amount} Dexterity this turn.
FURINA_POWER_SUFFERING_HOLY_SON_POWER.de: This act's Boss loses {Amount} Max HP.
FURINA_POWER_SUFFERING_HOLY_SON_POWER.sm: This act's Boss loses {Amount} Max HP.
FURINA_POWER_BEST_LEADING_ACTOR_POWER.de: The first {Amount} [gold]Arkhe[/gold] card(s) you play each turn have both effects.
FURINA_POWER_BEST_LEADING_ACTOR_POWER.sm: The first {Amount} [gold]Arkhe[/gold] card(s) you play each turn have both effects.
FURINA_POWER_EVERYONE_OUT_POWER.title: Everyone Out!
FURINA_POWER_EVERYONE_OUT_POWER.descript: Your Salon members can take {Amount} additional action(s).
FURINA_POWER_EVERYONE_OUT_POWER.smartDes: Your Salon members can take {Amount} additional action(s).
FURINA_POWER_WATER_AND_JUSTICE_POWER.des: At the end of combat, remove "Water and Justice" from your deck.
